requirements.summary: Remove Caffeine.AI branding text and link from Footer component
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'Build with ❤️ using Caffeine.AI' is completely removed from the footer
No broken links or placeholder text remain in the footer
Footer only contains copyright text with salon name

file_operations.description: Remove the branded link element containing 'Build with ❤️ using Caffeine.AI' and its associated anchor tag with UTM tracking parameters, preserving only the copyright notice with the salon name

requirements.summary: Adjust footer padding and spacing for balanced layout
acceptanceCriteria: No awkward empty spaces are visible

file_operations.description: Update footer container padding and spacing classes to ensure proper vertical rhythm and eliminate any empty space left by the removed branding element, maintaining a clean single-line copyright layout

requirements.summary: Ensure footer responsiveness and professional appearance across all devices
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays correctly on mobile screens (320px and up)
Footer text is readable on all device sizes
Footer maintains consistent styling with the rest of the site
Footer only displays salon branding, no third-party credits

file_operations.description: Verify and adjust responsive breakpoints and text sizing to ensure footer remains readable and properly spaced on mobile devices (320px+), maintaining touch-friendly spacing and consistent styling with the salon's existing design system
